book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the west and should include free wifi
The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should be in the expensive price range
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 1 people and 5 nights starting from monday
If the booking fails how about 1 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the same area as the hotel and should serve british food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 14:15 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
